docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FOR LACK OF SERVICE OF THE CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWT, ROBERT
TRIAL RESET TO APR-15-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-03-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE WAS: $191.27 SERVED MAR-19-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT FIGGINS, MONIQUE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROBERT NEWT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONIQUE FIGGINS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEWT, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIGGINS, MONIQUE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $191.27 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,191.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUGEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FIGGINS, MONIQUE HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NEWT, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT FIGGINS, MONIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) REMARKS: THE PROVIDED LOCATION IS PO BOX ONLY- THE DEFENDANT DIDN'T RESPOND TO THE NOTE TO CONTACT THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWT, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT FIGGINS, MONIQUE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWT, ROBERT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-03-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROBERT NEWT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONIQUE FIGGINS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: STEPEN MURPHY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
